# Research repositories

This directory is reserved for pinned external research repositories from:

```text
https://github.com/fims9000
https://github.com/lebedeffson
```

Do not copy source code here manually. Use pinned git submodules or controlled mirrors after:

```text
license review
commit pinning
adapter role definition
scenario mapping
```

The authoritative inventory is:

```text
registry/repositories.yaml
reports/validation/repository_inventory/repository_inventory.md
```
